mapper.insert: INSERT INTO email_send_log (task_id, provider, provider_message_id, email, send_status, error_code, error_message, request_id) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{provider}, #{providerMessageId}, #{email}, #{sendStatus}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{requestId})
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, provider, provider_message_id, email, send_status, error_code, error_message, request_id, create_time FROM email_send_log WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY id DESC
